## Describe the feature
A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see added.

## Problem / Motivation
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it.

Example:  
"I find it frustrating when ..."

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Screenshots / Examples
If applicable, add screenshots, concept images, or examples to help explain your idea.
